text: A pinboard full of children's drawings, right at the Rubicon between the outside world and Gardenview proper. No doubt a strategic placement so kids could leave their own grain of sand before they went back home.
There's a couple maps of the lower levels here, but none of them are nearly descriptive enough to use as any serious exploration aid.
They seem to have been made mainly to railroad children and their parents into specific entertainments.
Some of the room descriptions are straight up lies.
A series of portraits, framing the loyal Toon Handlers.
Too bad Side Characters didn't get their own handlers, I would've loved to have had a paramedic mentor.
Or a Wilderness First Responder... Or a Safety Inspector!
